verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur David, senex et plenus dierum, regem constituit Salomonem filium suum super Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְדָוִ֥יד זָקֵ֖ן וְשָׂבַ֣ע יָמִ֑ים וַיַּמְלֵ֛ךְ אֶת־שְׁלֹמֹ֥ה בְנ֖וֹ עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: David being old and full of days, made Solomon his son king over Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin David oli vanha ja elämästä kyllänsä saanut, asetti hän poikansa Salomon Israelin kuninkaaksi,
verses.king_james: So when David was old and full of days, he made Solomon his son king over Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et congregavit omnes principes Israël, et sacerdotes atque Levitas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֶּֽאֱסֹף֙ אֶת־כׇּל־שָׂרֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וְהַכֹּהֲנִ֖ים וְהַלְוִיִּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he gathered together all the princes of Israel, and the priests and Levites.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kokosi kaikki ylimmäiset Israelissa, ja papit ja Leviläiset,
verses.king_james: And he gathered together all the princes of Israel, with the priests and the Levites.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numeratique sunt Levitæ a triginta annis et supra : et inventa sunt triginta octo millia virorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסָּֽפְרוּ֙ הַלְוִיִּ֔ם מִבֶּ֛ן שְׁלֹשִׁ֥ים שָׁנָ֖ה וָמָ֑עְלָה וַיְהִ֨י מִסְפָּרָ֤ם לְגֻלְגְּלֹתָם֙ לִגְבָרִ֔ים שְׁלֹשִׁ֥ים וּשְׁמוֹנָ֖ה אָֽלֶף׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Levites were numbered from the age of thirty years, and upwards: and there were found of them thirty-eight thousand men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että Leviläiset luettaisiin hamasta kolmestakymmenestä ajastajasta ja sen ylitse. Ja heidän lukunsa oli päästä päähän, väkeviä miehiä, kahdeksanneljättäkymmentä tuhatta,
verses.king_james: Now the Levites were numbered from the age of thirty years and upward: and their number by their polls, man by man, was thirty and eight thousand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ex his electi sunt, et distributi in ministerium domus Domini, viginti quatuor millia : præpositorum autem et judicum, sex millia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֵאֵ֗לֶּה לְנַצֵּ֙חַ֙ עַל־מְלֶ֣אכֶת בֵּית־יְהֹוָ֔ה עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וְאַרְבָּעָ֖ה אָ֑לֶף וְשֹׁטְרִ֥ים וְשֹׁפְטִ֖ים שֵׁ֥שֶׁת אֲלָפִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Of these twenty-four thousand were chosen, and distributed unto the ministry of the house of the Lord: and six thousand were the overseers and judges.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joista oli neljäkolmattakymmentä tuhatta teettäjää Herran huoneessa, ja kuusituhatta virkamiestä ja tuomaria;
verses.king_james: Of which, twenty and four thousand were to set forward the work of the house of the Lord; and six thousand were officers and judges:

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro quatuor millia janitores, et totidem psaltæ, canentes Domino in organis quæ fecerat ad canendum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַרְבַּ֥עַת אֲלָפִ֖ים שֹׁעֲרִ֑ים וְאַרְבַּ֤עַת אֲלָפִים֙ מְהַֽלְלִ֣ים לַיהֹוָ֔ה בַּכֵּלִ֕ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר עָשִׂ֖יתִי לְהַלֵּֽל׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Moreover four thousand were porters: and as many singers singing to the Lord with the instruments, which he had made to sing with.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja neljätuhatta ovenvartiaa ja neljätuhatta niitä, jotka Herralle kiitosta veisasivat kanteleilla, jotka minä pannut olen kiitosta veisaamaan.
verses.king_james: Moreover four thousand were porters; and four thousand praised the Lord with the instruments which I made, said David, to praise therewith.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et distribuit eos David per vices filiorum Levi, Gerson videlicet, et Caath, et Merari.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֶּחָלְקֵ֥ם דָּוִ֖יד מַחְלְק֑וֹת {ס} לִבְנֵ֣י לֵוִ֔י לְגֵרְשׁ֖וֹן קְהָ֥ת וּמְרָרִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And David distributed them into courses by the families of the sons of Levi, to wit, of Gerson, and of Caath, and of Merari.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David teki järjestyksen Levin lapsille, Gersonille, Kahatille ja Merarille.
verses.king_james: And David divided them into courses among the sons of Levi, namely, Gershon, Kohath, and Merari.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Gerson : Leedan, et Semei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַגֵּרְשֻׁנִּ֖י לַעְדָּ֥ן וְשִׁמְעִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Gerson were Leedan and Semei.
verses.finnish_biblia: Gersonilaisia olivat Laedan ja Simei.
verses.king_james: Of the Gershonites were, Laadan, and Shimei.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Leedan : princeps Jahiel, et Zethan, et Joël, tres.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י לַעְדָּ֗ן הָרֹ֧אשׁ יְחִיאֵ֛ל וְזֵתָ֥ם וְיוֹאֵ֖ל שְׁלֹשָֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Leedan: the chief Jahiel, and Zethan, and Joel, three.
verses.finnish_biblia: Laedanin lapset: ensimäinen Jehieli, Setam ja Joel, kolme;
verses.king_james: The sons of Laadan; the chief was Jehiel, and Zetham, and Joel, three.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Semei : Salomith, et Hosiel, et Aran, tres : isti principes familiarum Leedan.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י שִׁמְעִ֗י (שלמות) [שְׁלֹמִ֧ית] וַחֲזִיאֵ֛ל וְהָרָ֖ן שְׁלֹשָׁ֑ה אֵ֛לֶּה רָאשֵׁ֥י הָאָב֖וֹת לְלַעְדָּֽן׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Semei: Salomith, and Hosiel, and Aran, three: these were the heads of the families of Leedan.
verses.finnish_biblia: Simein lapset: Salomit, Hasiel ja Haran, kolme. Nämät olivat Laedanin isäin ylimmäiset.
verses.king_james: The sons of Shimei; Shelomith, and Haziel, and Haran, three. These were the chief of the fathers of Laadan.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro filii Semei : Leheth, et Ziza, et Jaus, et Baria : isti filii Semei, quatuor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֣י שִׁמְעִ֔י יַ֣חַת זִינָ֔א וִיע֖וּשׁ וּבְרִיעָ֑ה אֵ֥לֶּה בְנֵֽי־שִׁמְעִ֖י אַרְבָּעָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the sons of Semei were Leheth, and Ziza, and Jaus, and Baria: these were the sons of Semei, four.
verses.finnish_biblia: Olivat myös nämät Simein lapset: Jahat, Sina, Jeus ja Beria. Nämät neljä olivat Simein lapset.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Shimei were, Jahath, Zina, and Jeush, and Beriah. These four were the sons of Shimei.

verses.latin_vulgate: Erat autem Leheth prior, Ziza secundus : porro Jaus et Baria non habuerunt plurimos filios, et idcirco in una familia, unaque domo computati sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִי־יַ֣חַת הָרֹ֔אשׁ וְזִיזָ֖ה הַשֵּׁנִ֑י וִיע֤וּשׁ וּבְרִיעָה֙ לֹא־הִרְבּ֣וּ בָנִ֔ים וַיִּֽהְיוּ֙ לְבֵ֣ית אָ֔ב לִפְקֻדָּ֖ה אֶחָֽת׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Leheth was the first, Ziza the second: but Jaus and Baria had not many children, and therefore they were counted in one family, and in one house.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jahat oli ensimäinen, Sina toinen. Mutta Jeuksella ja Berialla ei ollut monta lasta, sentähden luettiin ne yhdeksi isän huoneeksi.
verses.king_james: And Jahath was the chief, and Zizah the second: but Jeush and Beriah had not many sons; therefore they were in one reckoning, according to their father’s house.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Caath : Amram, et Isaar, Hebron, et Oziel, quatuor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י קְהָ֗ת עַמְרָ֥ם יִצְהָ֛ר חֶבְר֥וֹן וְעֻזִּיאֵ֖ל אַרְבָּעָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Caath were Amram, and Isaar, Hebron, and Oziel, four.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kahatin lapset: Amram, Jitshar, Hebron ja Ussiel, neljä.
verses.king_james: The sons of Kohath; Amram, Izhar, Hebron, and Uzziel, four.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Amram : Aaron et Moyses. Separatusque est Aaron ut ministraret in Sancto sanctorum, ipse et filii ejus in sempiternum, et adoleret incensum Domino secundum ritum suum, ac benediceret nomini ejus in perpetuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֥י עַמְרָ֖ם אַהֲרֹ֣ן וּמֹשֶׁ֑ה וַיִּבָּדֵ֣ל אַהֲרֹ֡ן לְֽהַקְדִּישׁוֹ֩ קֹ֨דֶשׁ קׇדָשִׁ֤ים הֽוּא־וּבָנָיו֙ עַד־עוֹלָ֔ם לְהַקְטִיר֩ לִפְנֵ֨י יְהֹוָ֧ה לְשָׁרְת֛וֹ וּלְבָרֵ֥ךְ בִּשְׁמ֖וֹ עַד־עוֹלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Amram, Aaron, and Moses. And Aaron was separated to minister in the holy of holies, he and his sons for ever, and to burn incense before the Lord, according to his ceremonies, and to bless his name for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Amramin lapset: Aaron ja Moses. Mutta Aaron eroitettiin, koska oli pyhitetty kaikkein pyhimmälle, hän ja hänen poikansa ijankaikkisesti, kantamaan suitsutusta Herran edessä, ja palvelemaan häntä, ja siunaamaan hänen nimeensä ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: The sons of Amram; Aaron and Moses: and Aaron was separated, that he should sanctify the most holy things, he and his sons for ever, to burn incense before the Lord, to minister unto him, and to bless in his name for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Moysi quoque hominis Dei filii annumerati sunt in tribu Levi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמֹשֶׁ֖ה אִ֣ישׁ הָאֱלֹהִ֑ים בָּנָ֕יו יִקָּרְא֖וּ עַל־שֵׁ֥בֶט הַלֵּוִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sons also of Moses, the man of God, were numbered in the tribe of Levi.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moseksen Jumalan miehen lapset luettiin Leviläisten sukukuntain sekaan.
verses.king_james: Now concerning Moses the man of God, his sons were named of the tribe of Levi.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Moysi : Gersom et Eliezer.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י מֹשֶׁ֔ה גֵּרְשׁ֖וֹם וֶאֱלִיעֶֽזֶר׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Moses were Gersom and Eliezer:
verses.finnish_biblia: Moseksen lapset olivat: Gersom ja Elieser.
verses.king_james: The sons of Moses were, Gershom, and Eliezer.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Gersom : Subuel primus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֥י גֵרְשׁ֖וֹם שְׁבוּאֵ֥ל הָרֹֽאשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Gersom: Subuel the first.
verses.finnish_biblia: Gersomin lapset: ensimäinen oli Sebuel.
verses.king_james: Of the sons of Gershom, Shebuel was the chief.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fuerunt autem filii Eliezer : Rohobia primus : et non erant Eliezer filii alii. Porro filii Rohobia multiplicati sunt nimis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּהְי֥וּ בְנֵֽי־אֱלִיעֶ֖זֶר רְחַבְיָ֣ה הָרֹ֑אשׁ וְלֹא־הָיָ֤ה לֶאֱלִיעֶ֙זֶר֙ בָּנִ֣ים אֲחֵרִ֔ים וּבְנֵ֥י רְחַבְיָ֖ה רָב֥וּ לְמָֽעְלָה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the sons of Eliezer were: Rohobia the first: and Eliezer had no more sons. But the sons of Rohobia were multiplied exceedingly.
verses.finnish_biblia: Elieserin lapset: ensimäinen oli Rehabia. Ja Elieserillä ei ollut muita lapsia, vaan Rehabeamin lapsia oli paljon enempi.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Eliezer were, Rehabiah the chief. And Eliezer had none other sons; but the sons of Rehabiah were very many.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Isaar : Salomith primus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֥י יִצְהָ֖ר שְׁלֹמִ֥ית הָרֹֽאשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Isaar: Salomith the first.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jitsharin lapset: Selomit ensimäinen.
verses.king_james: Of the sons of Izhar; Shelomith the chief.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Hebron : Jeriau primus, Amarias secundus, Jahaziel tertius, Jecmaam quartus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֖י חֶבְר֑וֹן יְרִיָּ֤הוּ הָרֹאשׁ֙ אֲמַרְיָ֣ה הַשֵּׁנִ֔י יַֽחֲזִיאֵל֙ הַשְּׁלִישִׁ֔י וִֽיקַמְעָ֖ם הָרְבִיעִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Hebron: Jeriau the first, Amarias the second, Jahaziel the third, Jecmaam the fourth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hebronin lapset: Jeria ensimäinen, Amaria toinen, Jahasiel kolmas ja Jakneam neljäs.
verses.king_james: Of the sons of Hebron; Jeriah the first, Amariah the second, Jahaziel the third, and Jekameam the fourth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Oziel : Micha primus, Jesia secundus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֖י עֻזִּיאֵ֑ל מִיכָ֣ה הָרֹ֔אשׁ וְיִשִּׁיָּ֖ה הַשֵּׁנִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Oziel: Micha the first, Jesia the second.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ussielin lapset: Miika ensimäinen ja Jissia toinen.
verses.king_james: Of the sons of Uzziel; Michah the first, and Jesiah the second.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Merari : Moholi, et Musi. Filii Moholi : Eleazar et Cis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֤י מְרָרִי֙ מַחְלִ֣י וּמוּשִׁ֔י בְּנֵ֥י מַחְלִ֖י אֶלְעָזָ֥ר וְקִֽישׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Merari: Moholi, and Musi. The sons of Moholi: Eleazar and Cis.
verses.finnish_biblia: Merarin lapset: Maheli ja Musi. Mahelin lapset: Eleasar ja Kis.
verses.king_james: The sons of Merari; Mahli, and Mushi. The sons of Mahli; Eleazar, and Kish.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mortuus est autem Eleazar, et non habuit filios, sed filias : acceperuntque eas filii Cis fratres earum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֙מׇת֙ אֶלְעָזָ֔ר וְלֹא־הָ֥יוּ ל֛וֹ בָּנִ֖ים כִּ֣י אִם־בָּנ֑וֹת וַיִּשָּׂא֥וּם בְּנֵי־קִ֖ישׁ אֲחֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Eleazar died, and had no sons but daughters: and the sons of Cis their brethren took them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Eleasar kuoli, ja ei ollut hänellä poikia, vaan tyttäriä, jotka heidän veljensä Kisin pojat naivat.
verses.king_james: And Eleazar died, and had no sons, but daughters: and their brethren the sons of Kish took them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Musi : Moholi, et Eder, et Jerimoth, tres.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י מוּשִׁ֗י מַחְלִ֥י וְעֵ֛דֶר וִירֵמ֖וֹת שְׁלוֹשָֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Musi: Moholi, and Eder, and Jerimoth, three.
verses.finnish_biblia: Musin lapset: Maheli, Eder ja Jeremot, kolme.
verses.king_james: The sons of Mushi; Mahli, and Eder, and Jeremoth, three.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hi filii Levi in cognationibus et familiis suis, principes per vices, et numerum capitum singulorum qui faciebant opera ministerii domus Domini, a viginti annis et supra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֣לֶּה בְנֵֽי־לֵוִי֩ לְבֵ֨ית אֲבוֹתֵיהֶ֜ם רָאשֵׁ֧י הָאָב֣וֹת לִפְקוּדֵיהֶ֗ם בְּמִסְפַּ֤ר שֵׁמוֹת֙ לְגֻלְגְּלֹתָ֔ם עֹשֵׂה֙ הַמְּלָאכָ֔ה לַעֲבֹדַ֖ת בֵּ֣ית יְהֹוָ֑ה מִבֶּ֛ן עֶשְׂרִ֥ים שָׁנָ֖ה וָמָֽעְלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: These are the sons of Levi in their kindreds and families, princes by their courses, and the number of every head that did the works of the ministry of the house of the Lord from twenty years old and upward.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät ovat Levin lapset heidän isäinsä huoneen jälkeen, isäin päämiehet, jotka nimien luvun jälkeen päästä päähän luetut olivat, jotka tekivät viran töitä Herran huoneen palveluksessa, kahdenkymmenen ajastaikaisista ja sen ylitse.
verses.king_james: These were the sons of Levi after the house of their fathers; even the chief of the fathers, as they were counted by number of names by their polls, that did the work for the service of the house of the Lord, from the age of twenty years and upward.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit enim David : Requiem dedit Dominus Deus Israël populo suo, et habitationem Jerusalem usque in æternum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֚י אָמַ֣ר דָּוִ֔יד הֵנִ֛יחַ יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל לְעַמּ֑וֹ וַיִּשְׁכֹּ֥ן בִּירוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם עַד־לְעוֹלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: For David said: The Lord the God of Israel hath given rest to his people, and a habitation in Jerusalem for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä David sanoi: Herra Israelin Jumala, joka on asuva Jerusalemissa ijankaikkisesti, on antanut kansallensa levon.
verses.king_james: For David said, The Lord God of Israel hath given rest unto his people, that they may dwell in Jerusalem for ever:

verses.latin_vulgate: Nec erit officii Levitarum ut ultra portent tabernaculum et omnia vasa ejus ad ministrandum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגַ֖ם לַלְוִיִּ֑ם אֵין־לָשֵׂ֧את אֶת־הַמִּשְׁכָּ֛ן וְאֶת־כׇּל־כֵּלָ֖יו לַעֲבֹדָתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it shall not be the office of the Levites to carry any more the tabernacle, and all the vessels for the service thereof.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ei Leviläiset tarvinneet kantaa majaa kaikkein hänen kaluinsa kanssa palvelukseen.
verses.king_james: And also unto the Levites; they shall no more carry the tabernacle, nor any vessels of it for the service thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Juxta præcepta quoque David novissima, supputabitur numerus filiorum Levi a viginti annis et supra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י בְדִבְרֵ֤י דָוִיד֙ הָאַ֣חֲרוֹנִ֔ים הֵ֖מָּה מִסְפַּ֣ר בְּנֵֽי־לֵוִ֑י מִבֶּ֛ן עֶשְׂרִ֥ים שָׁנָ֖ה וּלְמָֽעְלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: So according to the last precepts of David, the sons of Levi are to be numbered from twenty years old and upward.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Levin lapset luettiin Davidin viimeisten sanain jälkeen Leviläisten sekaan, kahdenkymmenen vuotisista ja sen ylitse,
verses.king_james: For by the last words of David the Levites were numbered from twenty years old and above:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erunt sub manu filiorum Aaron in cultum domus Domini, in vestibulis, et in exedris, et in loco purificationis, et in sanctuario, et in universis operibus ministerii templi Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י מַעֲמָדָ֞ם לְיַד־בְּנֵ֣י אַהֲרֹ֗ן לַֽעֲבֹדַת֙ בֵּ֣ית יְהֹוָ֔ה עַל־הַֽחֲצֵרוֹת֙ וְעַל־הַלְּשָׁכ֔וֹת וְעַֽל־טׇהֳרַ֖ת לְכׇל־קֹ֑דֶשׁ וּמַֽעֲשֵׂ֔ה עֲבֹדַ֖ת בֵּ֥ית הָאֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they are to be under the hand of the sons of Aaron for the service of the house of the Lord, in the porches, and in the chambers, and in the place of purification, and in the sanctuary, and in all the works of the ministry of the temple of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että heidän piti seisoman Aaronin lasten sivussa palvelemassa Herran huoneessa, kartanoilla ja kammioissa, ja kaikkinaisissa pyhitetyn puhdistuksissa, ja kaikissa viran töissä Herran huoneessa;
verses.king_james: Because their office was to wait on the sons of Aaron for the service of the house of the Lord, in the courts, and in the chambers, and in the purifying of all holy things, and the work of the service of the house of God;

verses.latin_vulgate: Sacerdotes autem, super panes propositionis, et ad similæ sacrificium, et ad lagana azyma, et sartaginem, et ad torrendum, et super omne pondus atque mensuram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְלֶ֨חֶם הַֽמַּעֲרֶ֜כֶת וּלְסֹ֤לֶת לְמִנְחָה֙ וְלִרְקִיקֵ֣י הַמַּצּ֔וֹת וְלַֽמַּחֲבַ֖ת וְלַמֻּרְבָּ֑כֶת וּלְכׇל־מְשׂוּרָ֖ה וּמִדָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the priests have the charge of the loaves of proposition, and of the sacrifice of fine flour, and of the unleavened cakes, and of the fryingpan, and of the roasting, and of every weight and measure.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja oleman näkyleipäin, sämpyläjauhoin, ruokauhrein, happamattomain kyrsäin, pannuin, halstarien ja kaikkein vaakain ja mittain päällä;
verses.king_james: Both for the shewbread, and for the fine flour for meat offering, and for the unleavened cakes, and for that which is baked in the pan, and for that which is fried, and for all manner of measure and size;

verses.latin_vulgate: Levitæ vero ut stent mane ad confitendum et canendum Domino : similiterque ad vesperam,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלַֽעֲמֹד֙ בַּבֹּ֣קֶר בַּבֹּ֔קֶר לְהֹד֥וֹת וּלְהַלֵּ֖ל לַֽיהֹוָ֑ה וְכֵ֖ן לָעָֽרֶב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Levites are to stand in the morning to give thanks, and to sing praises to the Lord: and in like manner in the evening,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja seisoman joka aamulla, kiittämässä ja ylistämässä Herraa, niin myös ehtoolla,
verses.king_james: And to stand every morning to thank and praise the Lord, and likewise at even;

verses.latin_vulgate: tam in oblatione holocaustorum Domini, quam in sabbatis et calendis et solemnitatibus reliquis juxta numerum et cæremonias uniuscujusque rei, jugiter coram Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְכֹ֨ל הַעֲל֤וֹת עֹלוֹת֙ לַֽיהֹוָ֔ה לַשַּׁ֨בָּת֔וֹת לֶחֳדָשִׁ֖ים וְלַמֹּעֲדִ֑ים בְּמִסְפָּ֨ר כְּמִשְׁפָּ֧ט עֲלֵיהֶ֛ם תָּמִ֖יד לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: As well in the oblation of the holocausts of the Lord, as in the sabbaths and in the new moons, and the rest of the solemnities, according to the number and ceremonies prescribed for every thing, continually before the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja uhraamassa Herralle kaikkinaiset polttouhrit sabbateina, uudelle kuulla ja juhlapäivinä, luvun ja tavan jälkeen, alati Herran edessä,
verses.king_james: And to offer all burnt sacrifices unto the Lord in the sabbaths, in the new moons, and on the set feasts, by number, according to the order commanded unto them, continually before the Lord:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et custodiant observationes tabernaculi fœderis, et ritum sanctuarii, et observationem filiorum Aaron fratrum suorum, ut ministrent in domo Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשָׁמְר֞וּ אֶת־מִשְׁמֶ֣רֶת אֹֽהֶל־מוֹעֵ֗ד וְאֵת֙ מִשְׁמֶ֣רֶת הַקֹּ֔דֶשׁ וּמִשְׁמֶ֕רֶת בְּנֵ֥י אַהֲרֹ֖ן אֲחֵיהֶ֑ם לַעֲבֹדַ֖ת בֵּ֥ית יְהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And let them keep the observances of the tabernacle of the covenant, and the ceremonies of the sanctuary, and the charge of the sons of Aaron their brethren, that they may minister in the house of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ottamassa vaarin seurakunnan majasta ja pyhyyden vartiosta, ja Aaronin lasten heidän veljeinsä vartiosta, Herran huoneen palveluksessa.
verses.king_james: And that they should keep the charge of the tabernacle of the congregation, and the charge of the holy place, and the charge of the sons of Aaron their brethren, in the service of the house of the Lord.
